payload.answer: Compiled architectural decisions and open questions for Brain memory.
citations: Brain DB should be the source of truth
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent
Open questions - Should Telegram be added later? Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?
payload.decision: Brain DB should be the source of truth; Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack should be a strict memory intake agent. Telegram integration and cheapest model selection remain open questions.

entity_resolution.reason: The summary contains architectural decisions and open questions about the Brain memory system; no explicit existing entity IDs were provided.

payload.intent: Compile durable memory from a chat summary about Brain architecture.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain personal memory system.
Cognee should be treated as a rebuildable semantic projection, not the source of truth.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent for Brain.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added later as part of the Brain architecture.
It is unresolved which model is cheapest while still saturating performance for Brain.

details: Created memory cards for three architecture decisions.
Created memory cards for two open questions.
Preserved Telegram and model choice as unresolved rather than current decisions.
